scope.purpose: Verify that supporting and challenging evidence remain visible

research_question.original_question: Does the available evidence support the current IBM interpretation?
source_requirements: Current live evidence before any external conclusion

evidence_records.claim_text: One preserved mock source supports the existing scoped interpretation.
evidence_records.source_quote_or_summary: Mock supporting interpretation for deterministic testing.
evidence_records.labpal_notes: This record validates challenge preservation only.

evidence_records.claim_text: A second preserved mock source challenges the existing scoped interpretation.
evidence_records.source_quote_or_summary: Mock challenging interpretation for deterministic testing.
evidence_records.labpal_notes: This record must remain visible beside supporting evidence.

source_interpretations.claim_text: The preserved evidence contains materially different interpretations.

labpal_interpretations.claim_text: The prior interpretation requires review because materially challenging evidence remains unresolved.

unknowns: Which interpretation better reflects external reality is unknown
No live independent verification has been performed
action_boundary_warnings: Research-only scope: no recommendation is permitted.
next_safe_actions: Preserve the reason for any revision

contradictions: Supporting and challenging evidence produce materially different interpretations
additional_unknowns: The contradiction has not been resolved within scope

previous_understanding.current_statement: The earlier scoped interpretation remained provisionally usable before the challenge appeared.

next_evidence_needed: Independent evidence capable of testing both interpretations
